label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out who Alice ends up with after all these partner switches. Let me start by listing out the initial pairings. Original partners: - Alice with Jamie - Bob with Patrick - Claire with Ophelia - Dave with Melissa - Eve with Rodrigo Now, the problem says there are several steps of partner switches. Let me go through each one step by step. First switch: Dave and Bob switch partners. So initially, Dave is with Melissa and Bob is with Patrick. After switching, Dave will be with Patrick, and Bob will be with Melissa. Let me note that down: After first switch: - Alice: Jamie - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Ophelia - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Rodrigo Second switch: Claire and Dave switch partners. Claire was with Ophelia, Dave is with Patrick. After switching, Claire will be with Patrick and Dave will be with Ophelia. After second switch: - Alice: Jamie - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Ophelia - Eve: Rodrigo Third switch: Eve and Alice switch partners. Eve is with Rodrigo, Alice is with Jamie. So after switching, Eve will be with Jamie and Alice will be with Rodrigo. After third switch: - Alice: Rodrigo - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Ophelia - Eve: Jamie Fourth switch: Claire and Eve switch partners. Claire is with Patrick, Eve is with Jamie. After switching, Claire will be with Jamie and Eve will be with Patrick. After fourth switch: - Alice: Rodrigo - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Jamie - Dave: Ophelia - Eve: Patrick Fifth switch: Alice and Eve switch partners. Alice is with Rodrigo, Eve is with Patrick. So after switching, Alice will be with Patrick and Eve will be with Rodrigo. Final pairings: - Alice: Patrick - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Jamie - Dave: Ophelia - Eve: Rodrigo So according to this, Alice ends up with Patrick. The options are (B) Patrick. Let me double-check each step to make sure I didn't make a mistake. First switch: Dave and Bob. Yes, their partners swap. Then Claire and Dave.
